steps.data:
<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: WC Checkout Hidden Field Bug Repro
 * Description: Minimal reproduction of hidden condition not working for location:address in WooCommerce Checkout Blocks. Related to issue #65416.
 * Version:     1.0.0
 * Author:      Cristiano Zanca
 * Requires Plugins: woocommerce
 * Requires at least: 6.4
 * Requires WC at least: 9.9
 * License:     GPL-2.0-or-later
 */
if ( ! defined( 'ABSPATH' ) ) { exit; }

/**
 * BUG: hidden condition on location:'address' with additional_fields reference never shows the field.
 *
 * Expected (per official docs March 2026):
 *   https://developer.woocommerce.com/docs/block-development/tutorials/how-to-conditional-additional-fields/
 *   Selecting 'Business' in the select should make 'VAT Number' appear.
 *
 * Actual:
 *   The VAT Number field NEVER appears regardless of the select value.
 *   No JS errors in console. No custom CSS or JS used.
 */

add_action( 'woocommerce_init', function () {
    if ( ! function_exists( 'woocommerce_register_additional_checkout_field' ) ) { return; }

    // Field 1: select -- renders correctly
    woocommerce_register_additional_checkout_field( array(
        'id'       => 'repro/customer-type',
        'label'    => 'Customer type (repro)',
        'location' => 'address',
        'type'     => 'select',
        'required' => true,
        'options'  => array(
            array( 'value' => '',         'label' => '-- Select --' ),
            array( 'value' => 'private',  'label' => 'Private' ),
            array( 'value' => 'business', 'label' => 'Business' ),
        ),
    ) );

    // Field 2: text -- BUG: never appears even when customer-type = business
    // Follows exactly the pattern from official docs section
    // 'Show Fields Based on Other Field Values'.
    // Only difference: location:'address' instead of location:'order'
    woocommerce_register_additional_checkout_field( array(
        'id'       => 'repro/vat-number',
        'label'    => 'VAT Number (should appear only for Business)',
        'location' => 'address',
        'type'     => 'text',
        'required' => array(
            'checkout' => array(
                'properties' => array(
                    'additional_fields' => array(
                        'properties' => array(
                            'repro/customer-type' => array( 'const' => 'business' ),
                        ),
                    ),
                ),
            ),
        ),
        'hidden' => array(
            'checkout' => array(
                'properties' => array(
                    'additional_fields' => array(
                        'properties' => array(
                            'repro/customer-type' => array(
                                'not' => array( 'const' => 'business' ),
                            ),
                        ),
                    ),
                ),
            ),
        ),
    ) );
} );

<?php
require '/wordpress/wp-load.php';
$post_id = wp_insert_post([
    'post_title'  => 'Test Product',
    'post_type'   => 'product',
    'post_status' => 'publish',
]);
if ( $post_id ) {
    update_post_meta( $post_id, '_price', '10' );
    update_post_meta( $post_id, '_regular_price', '10' );
    update_post_meta( $post_id, '_stock_status', 'instock' );
    update_post_meta( $post_id, '_visibility', 'visible' );
    update_post_meta( $post_id, '_manage_stock', 'no' );
    wp_set_object_terms( $post_id, 'simple', 'product_type' );
    echo 'Product created: ' . $post_id;
}
